SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: Broadcast non-profit religious programming through the use of a noncommercial radio network.

RlnOfActyToAccomOfExmptPrpsGrp.RelationshipStatementTxt: Programmers are requested to donate funds for broadcasting their
programs on the non-commercial radio network. Programmers are
generally churches and pastors, which is the primary means of
